{{Quote|Well...Inaldra doesn't really want me up there hunting. She says that I will...damage something. I'm a little clumsy with a blaster.|Wyle Artis, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:ASHT" />}}
'''Wyle Artis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] amateur [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he resided on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located above [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:ASHT" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> he met a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] whom he hired to hunt [[flit]]s and [[Scyk/Legends|scyks]] in Tansarii Point Station's atrium. Artis was enthusiastic about hunting but not particularly skilled at it. He was also very clumsy, which was why he felt he couldn't take on the creatures himself and hired help. Nevertheless, he pretended to have previously hunted and killed a [[Corellian sand panther/Legends|Corellian sand panther]] and even a [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt dragon]]. Wyle Artis later used the flit feathers and the scyk teeth to make a [[Necklace/Legends|necklace]] for his wife. As a reward he presented the spacer with a hunting necklace plus a small amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="SWG:ASHT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wyle Artis was a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ASHT" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Wyle Artis was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> He gave the player a single optional side quest.<ref name="SWG:ASHT" />
